purpose: Research triage for the popular Murugan song list. This file does not publish lyrics or recordings.

records.author: Arunagirinathar

evidence.sourceNote: Project Madurai Thiruppugazh Part I identifies it as song 1, Vinayagar invocation.

records.publicationDecision: Create a source-register record first. Do not copy the full Project Madurai file or excerpt without preserving and reviewing its distribution conditions.
records.nextAction: Match against the uploaded 2,191-page Thiruppugazh compilation, confirm exact numbering and text, then create a human-reviewed canonical record.

records.publicationDecision: No public record beyond research queue.
records.nextAction: Collect the exact opening line, singer or recording, album/film, approximate year and a source image or official listing.

evidence.sourceNote: Commercial album metadata and 1972 release listing.

records.publicationDecision: Metadata and official commercial link only; no lyrics, translation, notation or audio hosting.
records.nextAction: Create a withheld-rights-review metadata record after editorial confirmation.

records.publicationDecision: Metadata only until the exact composition, edition, raga/tala source and literary rights status are confirmed.
records.nextAction: Provide the exact incipit or recording so the correct Papanasam Sivan composition can be distinguished from similarly titled works.
Collect an authoritative printed source, official release credits or a rights-holder page.
Collect exact opening line, singer, composer/lyricist, album/film and release evidence.

evidence.sourceNote: Rights-holder catalogue credits. Lyrics displayed by the provider are not copied into this repository.

records.publicationDecision: Metadata and official commercial link only; no lyrics, translation or audio hosting.
records.nextAction: Create a withheld-rights-review metadata record after editorial confirmation.

records.classification: ambiguous bhajan or modern devotional song
records.publicationDecision: No canonical identity selected because multiple distinct songs use similar titles.
records.nextAction: Provide the recording or first four lines, singer, album and approximate year.

records.publicationDecision: Metadata and official commercial link only; no lyrics or hosted audio.
records.nextAction: Create a withheld-rights-review metadata record after editorial confirmation.

records.classification: refrain, slogan or song title not yet distinguished
records.publicationDecision: Do not create a standalone song record yet.
records.nextAction: Provide the exact recording or surrounding lyrics to distinguish a refrain from a canonical song title.

evidence.sourceNote: The commercial album lists the track in shortened form as Thiruchenduril with the relevant credits. Exact title wording still requires release-art confirmation.

records.publicationDecision: Metadata-only candidate; exact canonical commercial title must be confirmed before registration.
records.nextAction: Verify original label artwork or rights-holder catalogue title.

records.publicationDecision: No lyrics, credits or audio published.
records.nextAction: Collect exact recording, first lines, singer, label and release date.

records.publicationDecision: Metadata-only; no lyrics, translation or audio hosting until authoritative credits and rights are recorded.
records.nextAction: Obtain original label/album credits or a rights-holder catalogue record for lyricist, composer, performer and release date.

records.candidateAttribution: Vaalee is widely credited as lyricist; exact original-release evidence is still required.
records.publicationDecision: Metadata-only; no lyrics or hosted audio.
records.nextAction: Confirm original label credits, composer, performer and release date from a rights-holder source.

records.publicationDecision: Metadata only; permission required for lyrics, translation, notation, tune and audio.
records.nextAction: Request written permission from the official archive/rights holder.

records.publicationDecision: Metadata only; permission required for protected text, notation, choreography and audio.
records.nextAction: Request separate permissions for each protected layer.

safetyRules: A title match is not enough to publish lyrics.
Film, album and modern devotional compositions remain metadata-only unless rights are documented.
Ambiguous titles require an exact incipit or recording before canonical identity is assigned.
Project Madurai source files retain their header and distribution conditions; extracted texts require separate editorial and rights review.
Every audio recording requires a recording-level rights record independent of the underlying text.
